nasb.text: Abishai, the brother of Joab, the son of Zeruiah, was chief of the thirty. And he swung his spear against three hundred and killed them, and had a name as well as the three.

esv.text: Now Abishai, the brother of Joab, the son of Zeruiah, was chief of the thirty. And he wielded his spear against three hundred men and killed them and won a name beside the three.

cnv.text: 洗魯雅的兒子約押的兄弟亞比篩是三十勇士的首領。他曾揮舞矛槍殺死了三百人，因此他與“三勇士”齊名。

ccb.text: 洗鲁雅的儿子、约押的兄弟亚比筛是这三位勇士的统领，他曾挥矛刺死三百人，在三勇士中出了名，
